name: pineapple patch
objectDescription: A wild patch of pineapple plants growing between volcanic rocks. The fruit is small and fierce-looking, bristling with spiny leaves. Nobody planted these — they just showed up.

name: old man's memoir
objectDescription: An eccentric old man in a linen suit sits at the end of the bar with a stack of legal pads and a fountain pen he can't quite hold steady. He'll pay you a dollar for every page of his life story you transcribe. He talks fast and contradicts himself constantly.
